response.original_title: How to Set Up an Authenticator for Robinhood (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Setting up an authenticator app on Robinhood adds extra security to your account (: 1-863-338-2360)  It helps protect your login by requiring a time-based code in addition to your password (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Download an Authenticator App (: 1-863-338-2360)  Install a trusted app on your phone (: 1-863-338-2360)  Common options include:  Google Authenticator (: 1-863-338-2360)  Authy (: 1-863-338-2360)  Microsoft Authenticator (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: How to Set Up an Authenticator for Robinhood (: 1-863-338-2360)
